repo_prior_art.cite: CausalSmith/doc/API.md §3.1 ManskiNonparametricBounds_Study t2_thm is only selected-cell mean-dominance Manski algebra, not a selected-mixture odds-ratio envelope

published_prior_art.cite: HorowitzManski1995Censoring and SmithVanderWeele2019Selection cover mixture/bounding-factor sensitivity ingredients, but not this Lee principal-strata arm cell

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded_v1 is RD manipulation trimming; pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1 is ordinal principal-strata LP; neither is Lee always-selected bidirectional selection

published_prior_art.cite: LaffersNedela2017Sensitivity gives sharp LP sensitivity analysis for Lee bounds with simultaneous monotonicity/exogeneity relaxations; proposal needs a sharper separation from that result

Manski1990NonparametricBounds, HorowitzManski1995Censoring, SmithVanderWeele2019Selection, and LaffersNedela2017Sensitivity make strict finite-sensitivity tightening expected; equality-case classification is the remaining novelty

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest missed comparator is Laffers and Nedela 2017, Economics Letters, which gives sharp LP sensitivity analysis for Lee bounds while relaxing monotonicity; without a strict extension/separation from that paper, tier=field below novelty_target=flagship.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Semenova 2025 Generalized Lee Bounds is also a closer Lee-bound generalization than several checklist items; the proposal should explain why finite Gamma/kappa principal-strata bounds are not just another conditional/relaxed-monotonicity Lee variant.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary gamma-one
soundness_flags.one_line: The corollary says a_d=m_d for every admissible alpha, so theta_A is the singleton m_1-m_0; the text's claim that remaining uncertainty comes from the alpha interval is false.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a load-bearing comparison to Laffers and Nedela 2017 and state a strict non-subsumption claim: e.g. their LP relaxation cannot deliver the closed-form Gamma/kappa endpoint law, or this proposal handles a class their relaxation does not.
Fix the Gamma=1 sanity check to state the singleton theta_A=m_1-m_0, or add a different corner where alpha genuinely affects the estimand.

To reach flagship tier, upgrade Conjecture 1 into a strict extension/open-regime claim against named Lee-sensitivity papers, with an open set of observable laws where the new frontier is sharp and not representable by existing LP/conditional-monotonicity bounds.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature frontier and the Gamma=1 corollary; then restate the flagship claim as a strict extension beyond existing Lee sensitivity analyses.
